title: Select
description: Single selection from a list. Prefer native <select> for accessibility and platform behavior.

states.name: focus-visible
effects: Show focus ring using semantic border focus token.

states.name: invalid
effects: Show error text and aria-invalid; avoid relying on border color alone.

keyboard: Use native <select> to get correct keyboard behavior across platforms.
Tab focuses select; Arrow keys change selection depending on platform.
aria: Label via <label for> or wrapping label.
If invalid, set aria-invalid and connect error with aria-describedby.

must: Label must be programmatically associated with the select.
should: Prefer select when options are many; prefer radio group when options are few and benefit from visibility.
must_not: Do not replace native select with custom combobox unless you need search/virtualization.

token_usage.notes: Default border; on focus use semantic.color.border.focus.
